titleStmt.title: SII 8.591: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 591. (A.R. No. 283 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SUBRAHMANYA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntirapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu
9 Oṉpatāvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣa ttu tṛ tiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa kāttikai
nāḷ Irājakempiravaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭavarum Akarabrahmade yaṅkaḷārum Ivvaṉaivom ni
lavilai pramā ṇaicaivutiṭṭu . Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirupparāttuṟaiuṭaiyāṟ koyi
l Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ nilavilai pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭut
taparicāvatu . Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu karuppūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Āḷiyārāṉa keraḷāntaka
viḻupparaiyar muṉniṉṟu kaṭamai celavākkātapaṭiyāle Ivar marumakkaḷil kiḷiñalūr kiḻavaṉ va
āṉavaṉ viḻittuṟaṅkumperumāḷāṉa vāṉaviḻupparaiyaraiyum Ivar tampi kākkunāyakarāṉa maḻavataraiya
raiyum jakatekaviraccaruppetimaṅkalattu paṭaippaḷḷi nālāyiraviḻupparaiyaṉ vacamākac ciṟaiyil Iruntu kattaḷai mu
ṟittu Ōṭippoṉapaṭiyāle Ikkeraḷāntaka viḻupparaiyarperāl varum kaṭamai Ivar kāṇiyāṉa Ūrkaḷil vi
ḷai nilamum nattamum Āykuṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu Uṟpattiuḷḷatu Aṟa vilaiyākki koḷvārkku viṟṟuk kaṭamai
celavākkuvippateṉṟu Eṅkaḷukku tirumukam varukaiyil Ivarperāl [8vatu]This is represented by the symbol ā. varai cikaikkum 9
vatu kārkkaṭamaikkum [8vatu]This is represented by the symbol ā. (vatu)varai cikaiyil virāṭarāyar Aṉu sā ramāṉa nāḷil Ivarperāl tarattukkup
piṟittukkuṭuttuk kuṟaiyāy niṟkum paṇam Ivar Uṭalile kuṭuppateṉṟu Uṭaiyār pūpālarāyarkku Eḻutiṉa ti
rumukappaṭi paṇattukkum kāveriāṟṟut teṉṉāṟṟaṅkaraiyil tiṟap paṉusārattu Ivarkku Iṭṭa kolaṟai
kku Āḷ Eṟṟā kuṟṟattukku teṇṭamāka niccayittaruḷiṉa poṉṉāy vaṉṉāṭuuṭaiyār Aṭaippukkup piṟi
ttu Ivar kuṭuttuk kuṟaiyāṉa paṇamāy U� yāparañ ceytu kuṭutta paṇattukkum Uṭaiyār
tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār tevatāṉattu [8vatu] (vatu)varai cikaikkukkuṭi nāyiṉār Aṉusā ranāḷilp
piṟitta paṇattukkuk kuṭuttuk kuṟaivāṉa paṇattukku Ippaṟṟāḷarkku Ivaraikkāṭṭikkuṭuttal Ivar Uṭa
lile kuṭuppittal ceyvateṉṟu tiruviḷḷamāṉa paṇattukkum Uṭalāka Iṟṟaināḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk
kuṭutta Innāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattup paruttikkuṭiyāṉa tampikkiṉiyāṉnallūril tiṟappil Ivar kāṇi
yāy viṟṟa viḷainilam 3tma Innilam muṉṟe mukkāṇiyum puṉcey Akaimāṟu muḷpaṭṭa nilam 2 10- li Innila
m Irupatiṟṟuveliyum Ivarutāṉa maṉaikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vi
koṇṭu
ticaṇṭe
ṉaivom
ḷānta(nta)
ḷce
lavolaiyāvatākavum . Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ
māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatal
lātatākavum . Innilattu menokkiṉa maramum ki
ḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum potuvum potāriyum
bhāga mum bhāgāśra yamum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟppa
ṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutta I
vaiyiṟṟukku Ivar veṇum Eṉṟapote pra mā
The letter ṇa appears to be engraved above the line.ṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkakkaṭavomākavum . kuṭut
tilomākil Innila vilaipra māṇaicaivu
tiṭṭe pra māṇamāvatākavum . Ippaṭi samma
tittu vilaik kaṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu
viṟṟu vilaipra māṇaicaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutto
m Uṭaiyār tirupparāyttuṟaiuṭaiyār
koyil Āticaṇ[ ṭeśva] ra tevar kaṉmikaḷuk
ku Irājagambhīra vaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭavarum A
karam brahmade yaṅkaḷārum Ivvaṉaivom .
Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampicceṭṭu nampippirāṉ
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu [] Ippaṭikku Ivai
ṣritarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai
kārampicceṭṭu nararāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai nampūri tāmotarapaṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai kārampicceṭṭu celvanam
pi Eḻu[ttu ] Ippaṭikku Aṅkārai Aḻaki
yamaṇavāḷanampi Eḻuttu Ivai Aḻakiya
coḻa brahmā tirāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai [nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ [eḻuttu ] Ippaṭi
kku Ivai Aḻakiyacoḻa brahmā rāyaṉ E
ḻuttu . Ivai rācentiracoḻa Eḻu
rabrahmā rāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āṭkoḷipaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu [*] Ivai Āviṭaiyā(ṉ)yā bha ṭṭaṉ Eḻu
Ivai madhusūda nabha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu piṟama
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅkanārāya
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku māṅkaḷūr śrī
bha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ivai muḷḷikkuṟumpūruṭaiyāṉ Irācarācak kaṉapu
riveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai muḷḷikkuṟum
pūruṭaiyāṉ Aṟṟavan tillaiyuḷāṭuvāṉ E
ḻuttu . Ippaṭikku yalūr kiḻavaṉ Ilaṅ
kecuāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai vayalū
ruṭaiyāṉ coḻaṅkap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻu
ttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai vayalūruṭaiyā
ṉ viḻittuṟaṅkumpeḻumāḷāṉa katti Arai
yaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai vayalūrkiḻa
damaged
Irājakempiravaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭa
varum Akara bramma tecaṅkaḷārum
Uṭaiyār tirupparāttuṟaiuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil de vakaṉmam teva
kaḷ celvapaṭṭaṉum
kaṇakkuk kuṭa ṉu
m kaṇṭu . Iṉnāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟat
tu karuppūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉāṉa
keraḷā
Digital edition of SII 8.591 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
